headline: Williams Sonoma (WSM) Stock Looks Cheap On Cash Flow But Pricey On Earnings
summary: Williams-Sonoma’s share price has surged over the past few years, and at around US$233 the stock now trades in a range where the Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) intrinsic value estimate appears roughly in line with the market price, while broader valuation checks suggest the shares may be on the expensive side. Williams-Sonoma has returned about 286% over the past 3 years, which puts extra pressure on today’s buyers to justify paying up at current levels. Strong cash generation that has supported...
